title: Tromsoe Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap hits Tromsoe with a Z-Score of -3.40. Temperatures are significantly lower than average.
body:
The current cold snap in Tromsoe is causing extremely low temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a Level of CRITICAL.
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 12.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. The relative humidity is at 84%, and the wind speed is at 11.5 km/h.
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) at 0.0 GG highlights the cold nature of this event.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to frost
